sentences.target: J'ai de l'expérience avec les enfants.

translations.fr: J'ai de l'expérience avec les enfants.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有与孩子相处的经验。
translations.yue: 我有同小朋友相處嘅經驗。
translations.ru: У меня есть опыт работы с детьми.
translations.vi: Tôi có kinh nghiệm với trẻ em.
translations.hi: मुझे बच्चों के साथ काम करने का अनुभव है.
translations.ja: 子どもと関わった経験があります。

tokens.explanation: Elided subject pronoun before a vowel-initial verb; marks 1st person singular subject.
Main verb (present 1st singular) meaning 'to have'; agrees with the subject 'J''.
Preposition introducing a partitive construction with the elided article ('de l'... = 'some ...').
Elided definite article before a vowel; with 'de' forms the partitive determiner ('de l'...' = 'some ...').
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing a complement indicating the group with whom the experience is had.
Plural definite article modifying 'enfants'.
Plural common noun; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: C'est une bonne expérience pour moi.

translations.fr: C'est une bonne expérience pour moi.
translations.en: It's a good experience for me.
translations.es: Es una buena experiencia para mí.
translations.de: Das ist eine gute Erfahrung für mich.
translations.it: È una buona esperienza per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对我来说是一次很好的经历。
translations.yue: 對我嚟講係一次好嘅經驗。
translations.pt: É uma boa experiência para mim.
translations.tr: Bu benim için iyi bir deneyim.
translations.vi: Đây là một trải nghiệm tốt đối với tôi.
translations.nl: Het is een goede ervaring voor mij.
translations.hi: यह मेरे लिए एक अच्छा अनुभव है.
translations.pl: To jest dobre doświadczenie dla mnie.
translations.el: Είναι μια καλή εμπειρία για μένα.
translations.nb: Det er en god erfaring for meg.
translations.id: Ini pengalaman yang baik bagi saya.
translations.sv: Det är en bra erfarenhet för mig.
translations.ro: Este o experiență bună pentru mine.
translations.cs: Je to pro mě dobrá zkušenost.
translations.da: Det er en god erfaring for mig.
translations.ja: 私にとって良い経験です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun, elided before a vowel; syntactic subject of the copular clause.
Copula linking the subject ('C'') to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the predicate noun.
Adjective modifying 'expérience'; agrees in gender and number (feminine singular).
Predicate noun complement of the copula 'est'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/recipient complement.
Stressed pronoun functioning as the object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu as déjà de l'expérience en cuisine.
sentences.reading: /ty a deʒa də lɛkspeʁjɑ̃s ɑ̃ kɥizin/

translations.fr: Tu as déjà de l'expérience en cuisine.
translations.ipa: /ty a deʒa də lɛkspeʁjɑ̃s ɑ̃ kɥizin/
translations.en: You already have experience in cooking.
translations.es: Ya tienes experiencia en la cocina.
translations.de: Du hast schon Erfahrung beim Kochen.
translations.yue: 你已經有煮嘢食嘅經驗。
translations.ru: У тебя уже есть опыт в кулинарии.
translations.pt: Você já tem experiência na cozinha.
translations.tr: Zaten yemek yapma konusunda deneyimin var.
translations.vi: Bạn đã có kinh nghiệm nấu ăn rồi.
translations.nl: Je hebt al ervaring met koken.
translations.uk: У тебе вже є досвід у кулінарії.
translations.hi: तुम्हें खाना पकाने का पहले से अनुभव है.
translations.nb: Du har allerede erfaring med matlaging.
translations.sv: Du har redan erfarenhet av matlagning.
translations.da: Du har allerede erfaring med madlavning.
translations.ja: あなたはもう料理の経験があります。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb (present 2nd singular) meaning 'to have'; agrees with 'Tu'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Preposition beginning the partitive determiner sequence ('de l'... = 'some ...').
Elided definite article; with 'de' forms the partitive determiner ('de l'...').
Direct object of 'as'.
Preposition introducing a domain/field complement.
Common noun meaning 'cooking/culinary'; object of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons une expérience différente ce week-end.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ yn ɛkspeʁjɑ̃s difeʁɑ̃t sə wikɛnd/

translations.fr: Nous cherchons une expérience différente ce week-end.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ yn ɛkspeʁjɑ̃s difeʁɑ̃t sə wikɛnd/
translations.en: We're looking for a different experience this weekend.
translations.es: Buscamos una experiencia diferente este fin de semana.
translations.de: Wir suchen am Wochenende nach einem anderen Erlebnis.
translations.it: Cerchiamo un'esperienza diversa questo fine settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们这个周末在寻找不同的体验。
translations.yue: 我哋呢個週末想搵唔同嘅體驗。
translations.ru: Мы ищем в эти выходные необычные впечатления.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma experiência diferente neste fim de semana.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים חוויה אחרת בסוף השבוע הזה.
translations.tr: Bu hafta sonu farklı bir deneyim arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này chúng tôi đang tìm một trải nghiệm khác.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن تجربة مختلفة في عطلة نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.nl: We zijn op zoek naar een andere ervaring dit weekend.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо на ці вихідні інший досвід.
translations.hu: Ezen a hétvégén másfajta élményt keresünk.
translations.hi: हम इस सप्ताहांत एक अलग अनुभव की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Szukamy innego doświadczenia w ten weekend.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε για μια διαφορετική εμπειρία αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Vi ser etter en annerledes opplevelse denne helgen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari pengalaman yang berbeda akhir pekan ini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en annorlunda upplevelse i helgen.
translations.ro: Căutăm o experiență diferită în acest weekend.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en anderledes oplevelse i weekenden.
translations.ja: 今週末は違う体験を探しています。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb (present 1st plural) meaning 'to look for/seek'; agrees with 'Nous'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the object noun.
Direct object of 'cherchons'.
Adjective modifying 'expérience'; feminine singular agreement.
Demonstrative determiner modifying the time noun 'week-end'.
Borrowed noun functioning as a temporal adverbial ('this weekend').
